zh.lifeSummary: 當Godfrey de Gamage於1176年出生在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾洛吉特時，他的父親William de Gamage27歲，母親Elizabeth Miners15歲。他和Joan de Clare至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1253年在英國英格蘭賀福爾曼瑟爾 加馬享年77歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gamage
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Gammage  .

variants.name: Gammage
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): of Norman origin, a habitational name from Gamaches (Eure) in France.

nameMeanings.name: Godfrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old French name Godefroy, which is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from god ‘god’ (or gōd ‘good’) + fred, frid ‘peace’. This was adopted by the Normans, and brought to England by immigrants from the Low Countries and France. It was borne by a Norman saint ( c.1066–1115 ) who became bishop of Amiens. There has been considerable confusion with Geoffrey .

en.lifeSummary: When Godfrey de Gamage was born in 1176, in Rogiet, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, William de Gamage, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth Miners, was 15. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Joan de Clare. He died in 1253, in Mansell Gamage, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77.

ja.lifeSummary: Godfrey de Gamageが1176年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアロジエトで生まれた時，父William de Gamageは27歳，母Elizabeth Minersは15歳であった。彼はJoan de Clareとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1253年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアマンセル ガマッジで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Godfrey de Gamage(이)가 1176년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 로기트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Gamage(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Miners(은)는 15세였다. 그는 Joan de Clare(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1253년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 맨셀 갬아지에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Godfrey de Gamage родился в 1176 г. в местности рогиет, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Gamage было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Miners, 15. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Joan de Clare. Он умер в 1253 г. в местности манселл гамадж, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет.
